name: Cat I
notes: ESD Announcement 266 (Cabinet approval 17 Oct 2025): Category I EP minimum raised from RM10,000 to RM20,000 effective 1 June 2026.

name: Cat II
notes: ESD Announcement 266: Category II EP minimum raised from RM5,000-RM9,999 to RM10,000-RM19,999 effective 1 June 2026. Category II also requires JTKSM approval (s.60K) and Local Succession Plan.

name: Cat III
notes: ESD Announcement 266: Category III EP minimum raised from RM3,000-RM4,999 to RM5,000-RM9,999 effective 1 June 2026. Category III requires Local Succession Plan from June 1, 2026.
